messages.content: I'm doing well, thanks for asking. I'm ready to help you with any questions or tasks you may have, Moksh.
Create a file called test Jarvis on desktop.
test Jarvis created at C:\Users\ASUS\Desktop\test Jarvis.
In that file add Hello Jarvis.
I've added the text "Hello Jarvis" to the file test Jarvis on your desktop.

Automation supports opening and closing apps, play and search commands, system volume controls, and creating, editing, moving, renaming, and deleting files or folders across your laptop except protected system locations.
